name: BOMBARDMENT
description:
1/mission, begin the combat encounter garrisoned inside a single building in the battlefield that is 8 spaces away from the ADZ.

The building is an object that is Size 3, has 30 HP, 5 Evasion and E Defense and provides Hard Cover from all direction. It allows one single character at any given time to remain garrisoned inside it.

A character can enter and exit the building with a Quick Action
label: Free Action
